characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Long, straight blonde hair. She has a neutral to slightly expressive face with light makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey oversized hoodie with dark lettering on the front.
characters.demeanor: Focused, slightly confused at times, but engaged and conversational.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I am knowing English. [Yes, I am knowing English.]
Unknown speaker says: Technically it's understandable, but native speakers simply say, I speak English. [Technically it's understandable, but native speakers simply say, I speak English.]
Character A says: Ah, I speak English. [Ah, I speak English.]
Unknown speaker says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: My age is twenty-four years. [My age is twenty-four years.]
Unknown speaker says: You mean, I am twenty-four years old. [You mean, I am twenty-four years old.]
Character A says: I am twenty-four years old. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Unknown speaker says: What's your name? [What's your name?]
Character A says: Myself Nesly. [Myself Nesly.]
Unknown speaker says: Native speakers normally say, my name is Nesly. [Native speakers normally say, my name is Nesly.]
Character A says: Mmm, my name is Nesly. [Mmm, my name is Nesly.]
Unknown speaker says: Well done. [Well done.]
Character A says: Thanks, but who are you? [Thanks, but who are you?]
Unknown speaker says: मैं Supernova का AI tutor हूँ। हम रोज़ ऐसे ही बात करके English सीख सकते हैं। [I'm an AI tutor at Supernova. We can talk like this every day to learn English.]
Character A says: But मेरी English बहुत basic है। मुझे बोलने में डर लगता है। [But my English is very basic. I am scared to speak.]
Unknown speaker says: कोई बात नहीं! मैं तुम्हें हिंदी में समझा कर English बोलना सिखा सकता हूँ। [No problem! I can teach you to speak English by explaining in Hindi.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Unknown speaker says: हाँ, बिल्कुल! [Yes, absolutely!]
Character A says: Okay, मैं अभी Supernova app download करती हूँ। [Okay, I'm going to download the Supernova app now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: common grammatical mistakes made by non-native speakers.
- Introduces the AI tutor as a gentle, corrective conversational partner.
- Highlights the unique value proposition: learning English through Hindi explanations.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
